title: limonium majus
intro: Limonium majus, also known as sea lavender, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Limonium majus include its ability to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Limonium majus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
